race.name: Lake Louise Loppet
race.tagline: Western Canada's longest-running loppet — classic skiing beneath the turquoise-tinted Canadian Rockies.

vitals.registration: Open registration via Calgary Ski Club

climate.description: Lake Louise sits at 1,540m in the Canadian Rockies with reliable cold winter conditions. March temperatures typically range from -15°C to -5°C. Chinook winds can occasionally bring rapid warming, but the altitude usually guarantees excellent snow.
challenges: High altitude at 1,540m can affect effort
Cold Rocky Mountain temperatures in early March
Occasional Chinook wind events can warm conditions rapidly
Remote mountain setting requires advance planning

course.primary: Classic-only course through the stunning Lake Louise area of Banff National Park, with mountain scenery throughout. Terrain suitable for all ages and abilities.
course.surface: Groomed classic tracks on Banff National Park trails
course.grooming: Good Parks Canada / club standard grooming
features: Set in Banff National Park beneath the Canadian Rockies
Spectacular mountain scenery at every turn
Community fun race format welcoming all ages

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Outstanding scenery in Banff National Park and excellent snow reliability at altitude compensate for the shorter distance and modest field size. Over 50 years of heritage as Western Canada's oldest loppet.

history.summary: The Lake Louise Loppet was founded in 1972, making it the longest-running loppet in Western Canada. Organized by the Calgary Ski Club, it has been a community institution for over five decades. The event celebrated its 50th anniversary in 2022. Set against the spectacular backdrop of the Canadian Rockies in Banff National Park, it emphasizes participation and community over competition.
notable_facts: Founded in 1972 — Western Canada's longest-running loppet
Set in Banff National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage Site
Classic technique only — preserves traditional skiing format
Community fun race open to all ages and abilities

youtube_data.search_query: Lake Louise Loppet cross country ski race Lake Louise
